email.objective: Deepen loyalty, leverage brand advocacy, increase referral revenue.

subject_examples: You're one of our VIPs — here's your exclusive access 🎁
Early access: [New collection] drops tomorrow — just for you
email_sequence.body_focus: VIP badge reveal, early access to new products/sales.

subject_examples: Share the love — earn [X]€ for every friend you refer
Your friends deserve [Brand] too — give them 15% off
email_sequence.body_focus: Referral program introduction with dual-sided incentive.

subject_examples: Congratulations on your 10th order — a gift from us
You've unlocked Gold status — here's what that means
email_sequence.body_focus: Loyalty milestone celebration, gift or upgrade reveal.

email.avoid: Discounts — Champions buy without them; discounting trains them to wait.

whatsapp.objective: Deliver premium, personalised service and recover abandoned carts fast.

flows.template: Hi {{first_name}}, your [Brand] order #{{order_id}} is confirmed! We'll message you when it ships. Thank you for being a VIP customer 🌟
flows.notes: Send immediately after order. No opt-in required for transactional.

flows.template: Great news, {{first_name}}! Your order #{{order_id}} is on its way. Track it here: {{tracking_url}}
flows.notes: Include live tracking link. Keep under 160 chars for readability.

flows.template:
Hey {{first_name}}, you left something behind! Your cart has {{cart_item_count}} item(s) ready. Complete your purchase: {{cart_url}}

As a VIP, we've held your items for 24 hours. 🔒
flows.notes: Opt-in required. Maximum 1 message per abandoned cart.

flows.template: {{first_name}}, your VIP early access starts NOW! Get {{discount_pct}}% off before anyone else: {{sale_url}} Offer ends in 24 hours. ⚡
flows.notes: High urgency. Send once only. Do not resend.

whatsapp.opt_in_recommendation: Request WhatsApp opt-in at checkout (pre-ticked for VIPs).

promotions.rationale: Champions buy at full price; discounting devalues the brand in their eyes and trains price-sensitivity. Focus on non-monetary perks.

promotions.name: VIP Early Access
promotions.benefit: Access to new collection 24-48h before general public

promotions.name: Complimentary Gift with Purchase
promotions.benefit: Free branded gift on orders above average order value

promotions.name: Loyalty Tier Upgrade
promotions.benefit: Fast-track to Gold/Platinum tier with free shipping + priority support

promotions.avoid: Percentage discounts and flash sales visible to this segment.
promotions.expected_margin_impact: Neutral to positive — loyalty deepens without margin erosion.

email.objective: Increase basket size and introduce premium product lines.

subject_examples: Since you loved [Product], you'll want to see this
Complete your collection — items that go perfectly with your last order
email_sequence.body_focus: Curated cross-sell recommendations based on purchase history.

subject_examples: Level up: our premium [Category] range is here
You've tried the good — here's the best
email_sequence.body_focus: Upsell to premium tier with quality/benefit comparison.

subject_examples: Loyal customers get 12% off — because you've earned it
A little thank-you: free shipping on your next order
email_sequence.body_focus: Modest loyalty reward (10-15% discount or free shipping).

email.avoid: Deep discounts — erodes margin with already-buying customers.

whatsapp.objective: Keep loyal buyers informed of relevant restocks and recover lost revenue.

flows.template: Hi {{first_name}}, order #{{order_id}} confirmed! Expected delivery: {{delivery_estimate}}. We'll update you when it ships.
{{first_name}}, great news! {{product_name}} is back in stock. You bought it before — grab yours again: {{product_url}}
flows.notes: Only send if customer purchased this product previously. Max 1/product.

flows.template: Hi {{first_name}}, you left {{cart_item_count}} item(s) in your cart. Ready to complete your order? {{cart_url}}
flows.notes: Simple recovery — no discount on first attempt for Loyal segment.

whatsapp.opt_in_recommendation: Request opt-in post-purchase via thank-you page.
whatsapp.frequency_note: Monitor read rate; pause if below 40%.

promotions.rationale: Loyal customers deserve recognition but do not yet require heavy discounts. 10-15% keeps margins healthy while rewarding continued engagement.

promotions.name: Loyalty Appreciation Discount
promotions.benefit: 12% off sitewide as a thank-you for loyalty

promotions.name: Free Shipping Upgrade
promotions.benefit: Free express shipping on all orders for 30 days

promotions.avoid: Deep 30%+ discounts — Loyal customers don't need them.
promotions.expected_margin_impact: Modest margin reduction (est. -2 to -4 margin points) offset by increased order frequency.

email.objective: Re-engage lapsing customers before they churn completely.

subject_examples: We miss you, [First Name] — look what's new
It's been a while… here's what you've been missing
email_sequence.body_focus: Soft re-engagement — new arrivals or restocks in their category.

subject_examples: Come back — 20% off, just for you
[First Name], we have something special: 20% off expires in 72 hours
email_sequence.body_focus: Urgency discount offer (20-25%) with clear expiry.

subject_examples: Last chance: your 25% off expires tonight
We don't want to lose you — one final offer
email_sequence.body_focus: Final urgency + escalated discount (25%). Acknowledge absence.

email.avoid: Sending more than 3 win-back emails — it signals desperation.

whatsapp.objective: High-visibility re-engagement complementing the email win-back flow.

flows.template: Hi {{first_name}}, it's been a while — we miss you! Here's what's new at [Brand]: {{shop_url}} 👀
flows.notes: Send once. Do not follow up immediately on WhatsApp.

flows.trigger: 7 days after soft re-engagement (if no purchase)
flows.template: {{first_name}}, we want you back! Use code {{coupon_code}} for 20% off — expires in 48 hours. Shop: {{shop_url}} ⏰
flows.notes: Final WhatsApp message in this sequence. Suppress after if no response.

whatsapp.opt_in_recommendation: Only message customers who previously opted in.
whatsapp.frequency_cap: Max 2 win-back messages. Do not exceed.
whatsapp.frequency_note: Coordinate timing with email win-back: send WhatsApp 2 days after email to reinforce.

promotions.rationale: Customers are drifting and need a compelling reason to return. 20-25% with a tight expiry creates urgency without feeling desperate.

promotions.name: Win-Back Offer — Step 1
promotions.frequency: Triggered at 45-60 days since last order

promotions.name: Win-Back Offer — Step 2 (Escalated)
promotions.frequency: 7 days after Step 1 if no purchase

promotions.avoid: Offering discounts indefinitely without an expiry — no urgency created.
promotions.expected_margin_impact: Significant margin hit (~20-25 points) but necessary to recover otherwise lost revenue. ROI positive if ≥10% of at-risk customers convert.

email.objective: Convert single or infrequent buyers into habitual purchasers.

subject_examples: How did you enjoy your [Product]? Here's what others got next
People who bought [Product] also loved these
10% off your next order — just for coming back
We saved something for you: 10% off expires in 48 hours
email_sequence.body_focus: Light discount to nudge second purchase.

subject_examples: [Brand] members save more — here's why loyal customers love us
What happens when you order twice from [Brand]
email_sequence.body_focus: Benefits of continued purchasing (loyalty perks, convenience).

email.avoid: Overwhelming with too many emails too quickly.

whatsapp.objective: Use WhatsApp as a high-visibility channel to drive the second purchase.

flows.template: Hi {{first_name}}, your order is confirmed! 🎉 Order #{{order_id}} — expected by {{delivery_estimate}}.

flows.trigger: 14 days after first purchase (no second order)
flows.template: Hey {{first_name}}! Hope you're loving your {{product_name}}. We'd love to see you again — here's 10% off your next order: {{coupon_code}} Valid for 7 days. Shop now: {{shop_url}}
flows.notes: Pair with email campaign for maximum reach.

whatsapp.opt_in_recommendation: Offer WhatsApp updates as an upgrade during checkout.
whatsapp.frequency_cap: Max 2 promotional messages in first 30 days.
whatsapp.frequency_note: Do not send if email is being received and engaged with.

promotions.rationale: Getting a customer to buy twice is the biggest conversion lever in ecommerce. A 10% offer is economically justified by the long-term CLV gain.

promotions.name: Second Purchase Coupon
promotions.benefit: 10% off second order, auto-applied or code-based
promotions.frequency: One-time, sent 7-14 days after first order

promotions.name: Bundle Deal
promotions.benefit: Buy 2, get 10% off — encourages higher basket size

promotions.avoid: Deep discounts before demonstrating product value.
promotions.expected_margin_impact: Short-term margin reduction offset by lifetime value increase for customers who become Loyal.

email.objective: Recover a small percentage of churned customers; understand why others left.

subject_examples: We want you back — 30% off, no strings attached
[First Name], we're offering our biggest discount ever: 30% off
email_sequence.body_focus: Generous reactivation offer (30%) with free returns.

subject_examples: Before you go — would you tell us why?
Quick question: what could [Brand] do better?
email_sequence.body_focus: Feedback survey (3 questions max). Offer small gift for completing.

email.avoid: Continuing to email after no response — move to suppression list to protect sender reputation.

whatsapp.objective: One last high-value offer via WhatsApp to recover churned customers.

flows.template:
Hi {{first_name}}, we haven't seen you in a while and we want to fix that. Here's our best offer: 30% off + free returns. Code: {{coupon_code}} | Shop: {{shop_url}}
Offer expires in 72 hours.
flows.notes: Send only once. If no response, suppress from all WhatsApp communications and remove from promotional email lists.

whatsapp.opt_in_recommendation: Only contact customers with active WhatsApp consent.
whatsapp.frequency_note: Respect customer fatigue — this is a last-resort channel.

promotions.rationale: Churned customers require a significantly compelling offer to return. 30% + free returns removes price AND risk barriers simultaneously.

promotions.name: Reactivation Discount
promotions.benefit: 30% off entire order + free returns (no-risk trial)

promotions.avoid: Repeated reactivation offers — trains price-seeking behaviour.
promotions.expected_margin_impact: Deep margin hit (~30 points) but expected reactivation rate is low (3-8%). Total revenue recovery must exceed discount + returns cost.

email.objective: Maintain brand awareness for unclassified customers.

subject_examples: [Brand] Monthly Highlights — what's new this month
email_sequence.body_focus: Curated content: new arrivals, blog posts, community highlights.

email.avoid: Aggressive sales messaging without prior engagement data.

whatsapp.objective: Maintain trust through reliable order communication only.

flows.template: Hi {{first_name}}, your order #{{order_id}} is confirmed. We'll update you when it ships.
flows.notes: Stick to transactional until segment clarifies.

whatsapp.opt_in_recommendation: Collect opt-in but do not send promotional messages yet.
whatsapp.frequency_note: Reassign segment before launching promotional flows.

promotions.rationale: Unclassified customers should receive standard sitewide promotions only.

promotions.name: Seasonal Sale
promotions.benefit: 10% off sitewide during major sale events

promotions.avoid: Personalised offers until segment is properly classified.

Champion.objective: Deepen loyalty, leverage brand advocacy, increase referral revenue.

Loyal.objective: Increase basket size and introduce premium product lines.

At_Risk.objective: Re-engage lapsing customers before they churn completely.

Potential_Loyal.objective: Convert single or infrequent buyers into habitual purchasers.

Lost.objective: Recover a small percentage of churned customers; understand why others left.

Others.objective: Maintain brand awareness for unclassified customers.

Champion.objective: Deliver premium, personalised service and recover abandoned carts fast.

Loyal.objective: Keep loyal buyers informed of relevant restocks and recover lost revenue.

At_Risk.objective: High-visibility re-engagement complementing the email win-back flow.
At_Risk.send_frequency: Max 2 win-back messages. Do not exceed.

Potential_Loyal.objective: Use WhatsApp as a high-visibility channel to drive the second purchase.
Potential_Loyal.send_frequency: Max 2 promotional messages in first 30 days.

Lost.objective: One last high-value offer via WhatsApp to recover churned customers.

Others.objective: Maintain trust through reliable order communication only.

executive_summary: Total analysed customer base: 500 customers with combined CLV of $609,675.
Highest-priority segment: Champion (86 customers, $197,465 total CLV).
URGENT: 126 customers are At Risk ($143,164 CLV). Launch win-back campaign immediately.
77 customers are Lost ($20,959 historical CLV). Deploy reactivation offer with 30% discount.
Month-1 cohort retention is strong at 54.3% (benchmark: 20%).
